data.raceComments: {"comment":"4. HEY ERNIE is on a hot streak recording a 18.72 win over 350m at this track last start following on from a powerful 18.80 success at this track over 350m the start prior. Expecting another bold showing. 3. CYCLONE TIM has won at this course and distance – one to keep very safe. 7.
